name: George Gilder
bio: George Franklin Gilder is an American investor, author, economist, and co-founder of the Discovery Institute. His 1981 book, Wealth and Poverty, advanced a case for supply-side economics and capitalism during the early months of the Reagan administration. He is the chairman of George Gilder Fund Management, LLC.
notableWorks: The party that lost its head
The Scandal of Money: Why Wall Street Recovers
